languages.text: {n}Высокий Фактотум слегка бледнеет и отводит взгляд в сторону.{/n} "Вот как. Это весомый аргумент для того, чтобы считать обладателя клинка весьма примечательной персоной. Даже среди Вольных Торговцев далеко не каждый может позволить себе обладание подобной... вещью. Видимо, это подлинный портрет Себериана".

{n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."
languages.original_text: {n}Высокий Фактотум слегка бледнеет и отводит взгляд в сторону.{/n} "Вот как. Это весомый аргумент для того, чтобы считать обладателя клинка весьма примечательной персоной. Даже среди Вольных Торговцев далеко не каждый может позволить себе обладание подобной... вещью. Видимо, это подлинный портрет Себериана".

traits.locale_text: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

{n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

{n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

languages.text: {n}高阶顾问的脸色微微发白，移开了目光。{/n}“原来如此。这个证据确实很有力，那把剑的持有者绝对是极其显赫的人物。即便在行商浪人中，也不是谁都有能力拥有这等……物件。那幅画像多半真的是塞贝里安本人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}高阶顾问的脸色微微发白，移开了目光。{/n}“原来如此。这个证据确实很有力，那把剑的持有者绝对是极其显赫的人物。即便在行商浪人中，也不是谁都有能力拥有这等……物件。那幅画像多半真的是塞贝里安本人。”

languages.text: {n}El Sumo Factótum palidece visiblemente y aparta la mirada.{/n} «Ya veo. Es un claro indicio de que el portador de la espada era un individuo muy distinguido. La posesión de un... artículo como ese no está al alcance de muchos, ni siquiera para un Comerciante Independiente. Debe de ser un retrato auténtico de Seberian».
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Sumo Factótum palidece visiblemente y aparta la mirada.{/n} «Ya veo. Es un claro indicio de que el portador de la espada era un individuo muy distinguido. La posesión de un... artículo como ese no está al alcance de muchos, ni siquiera para un Comerciante Independiente. Debe de ser un retrato auténtico de Seberian».

languages.text: {n}Le haut factotum détourne le regard en pâlissant.{/n} « Je vois. Cela laisse à penser que le porteur de cette lame était un individu exceptionnel. Rares sont ceux, même parmi les libres-marchands, qui possèdent un tel... objet. Ce doit être un portrait fidèle de Seberian. »
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le haut factotum détourne le regard en pâlissant.{/n} « Je vois. Cela laisse à penser que le porteur de cette lame était un individu exceptionnel. Rares sont ceux, même parmi les libres-marchands, qui possèdent un tel... objet. Ce doit être un portrait fidèle de Seberian. »

languages.text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum erbleicht leicht und wendet den Blick ab.{/n} "Ich verstehe. Das ist ein starker Indikator, dass der Träger der Klinge eine mit höchsten Ehren ausgezeichnete Person war. Selbst unter Freihändlern leistet sich nicht jeder ein derartiges ... Objekt. Das muss ein authentisches Porträt von Seberian sein."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum erbleicht leicht und wendet den Blick ab.{/n} "Ich verstehe. Das ist ein starker Indikator, dass der Träger der Klinge eine mit höchsten Ehren ausgezeichnete Person war. Selbst unter Freihändlern leistet sich nicht jeder ein derartiges ... Objekt. Das muss ein authentisches Porträt von Seberian sein."

languages.text: {n}Arşıkâhya hafifçe soluyor ve bakışlarını kaçırıyor.{/n} "Anlıyorum. Bu, kılıcı kullanan kişinin son derece seçkin bir birey olduğunun güçlü bir göstergesi. Hür Tacirler arasında bile herkes böyle bir... Eşyaya sahip olamaz. Bu, Seberian'ın gerçek portresi olmalı."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}Arşıkâhya hafifçe soluyor ve bakışlarını kaçırıyor.{/n} "Anlıyorum. Bu, kılıcı kullanan kişinin son derece seçkin bir birey olduğunun güçlü bir göstergesi. Hür Tacirler arasında bile herkes böyle bir... Eşyaya sahip olamaz. Bu, Seberian'ın gerçek portresi olmalı."

languages.text: {n}ハイ・ファクトタムはわずかに青ざめ、目をそらす。{/n}「なるほど。この刀の持ち主が、きわめて高名な人物であったことを示す強力な証拠ですね。ローグ・トレーダーの中でさえ、このような…品を所有できる者は限られています。これはセベリアンの本物の肖像画に違いありません。」
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}ハイ・ファクトタムはわずかに青ざめ、目をそらす。{/n}「なるほど。この刀の持ち主が、きわめて高名な人物であったことを示す強力な証拠ですね。ローグ・トレーダーの中でさえ、このような…品を所有できる者は限られています。これはセベリアンの本物の肖像画に違いありません。」
